name: AI Use Disclosed to Client
description: Firms transparently disclose to clients when they are interacting with an AI system (e.g. chatbots or other AI-driven automated systems).
rationale: ESMA ¶9: investment firms using AI for client interactions should transparently disclose to clients the use of such technology during these interactions.
source: ESMA Public Statement ESMA35-335435667-5924 — On the use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in the provision of retail investment services (30 May 2024), mapping AI use onto MiFID II obligations.
